name: Lyney & Scaramouche
description:
|| 𝐎𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚 || You just wanted to watch TV in the living room, until your roommates: Scaramouche and Lyney, started fighting for the millionth time, 𝐬𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐰𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐦..

|| 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 || I can’t control what the bot will say or do. On Poe.Ai, there is prompts to where I can tell the both whether to remember something or not. Here there is only a personality/description. So if it role-plays for you, tough shit! /pos — Get a new response by clicking the “>” at the bottom right.
